channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MPs Condemn Misleading Comparisons of Student Loans to Phone Contracts
item.description: A report by the Treasury Committee has criticized the government's practice of comparing student loan repayments to phone contracts or cinema tickets as 'mis-selling', arguing that such comparisons we...

item.title: Netflix's Binge Model Faces Challenges from Short-Form Content
item.description: The article discusses how Netflix's original binge-watching model, which revolutionized streaming by releasing entire seasons at once, may now be outdated due to changing viewer habits and competition...

item.title: Indian Embassy in Washington renews $1.8 million lobbying contract with SHW Partners for outreach to the Trump administration
item.description: India's Embassy in Washington has renewed a 12-month lobbying agreement worth $1.8 million with SHW Partners LLC, a firm founded by Jason Miller, who previously served as US President Donald Trump's c...

item.title: Colonial wildlife laws in Africa fail to balance conservation and community needs
item.description: The article discusses how Africa's wildlife laws, rooted in colonial-era systems, continue to separate communities from nature and restrict their access to land and resources. These laws, based on the...

item.title: Kenyan Prince Sparks Speculation After Being Spotted With Mystery Woman At Summer Tides
item.description: Kenyan Prince, a self-declared forex trader, has sparked fresh rumors after being captured on video spending time with an unidentified woman at the Summer Tides event in Malindi. The incident comes am...

item.title: US Soccer Team's Collapse Against Belgium Ends Historic World Cup Campaign
item.description: The United States men's national soccer team faced a devastating defeat against Belgium in a World Cup qualifier, marking the end of their historic campaign. Despite early momentum, the U.S. defense c...

item.title: Technical issue: Access blocked for non-bot users
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered by users attempting to access a news website, indicating they may have been mistakenly identified as a crawler bot. News Corp Australia employs softw...

item.title: Swedish House Mafia and Lykke Li Collaborate on Emotional Track 'Happiness Is So Sad'
item.description: Swedish House Mafia have premiered their collaboration with Lykke Li, the track 'Happiness Is So Sad', during their Ushuaïa Ibiza residency. The song, featuring production from Max Martin and Oscar Ho...

item.title: Mumbai Police Register Stalking Case Against Lieutenant Colonel
item.description: A Lieutenant Colonel has been booked by Mumbai police for allegedly stalking a female colleague during the Tata Mumbai Marathon on January 18. The complaint, received via email by Kolkata Police and t...

item.title: Shooting in Scarborough Leaves One Dead, Another Critically Injured
item.description: A shooting incident in Scarborough, Toronto, resulted in one fatality and another person being critically injured, according to Toronto police. The incident occurred on Monday afternoon at approximate...

item.title: FA considers legal appeal over Trump's influence in Folarin Balun's World Cup case
item.description: The article discusses the potential legal appeal by the Football Association (FA) against a controversial decision related to Folarin Balun, a player whose case was influenced by former US President D...

item.title: Two-Year-Old Shot in Kensington Faces Uncertain Recovery
item.description: A two-year-old boy, Emilio Lindeman Jr, was shot in Kensington by unidentified gunmen while walking with his mother in Glider Crescent. The incident occurred around 10:10pm on Saturday night when susp...

item.title: India accuses Hafiz Saeed of masterminding Kashmir attack
item.description: India’s National Investigation Agency (NIA) has charged Pakistan-based cleric Hafiz Saeed with orchestrating a terrorist attack on tourists in Indian-administered Kashmir. The Pahalgam incident, which...

item.title: News Corp Australia bot detection message for readers
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If users encounter a bot detection message and are not automated crawlers, they ar...

item.title: Venezuela's Earthquakes Result in Over 3,500 Casualties
item.description: The death toll from two powerful earthquakes that struck Venezuela has surged to over 3,535, according to Agence France-Presse. The twin earthquakes, which occurred on July 7, 2026, caused widespread ...

item.title: Mbappe Condemns Racist Remarks by Paraguayan Senator After World Cup Match
item.description: France's Kylian Mbappe has strongly condemned Paraguayan senator Celeste Amarilla after she made racist remarks about his background following France's World Cup victory. Amarilla, from Paraguay's Lib...

item.title: Belgium Advances to World Cup Quarter-Finals with 4-1 Win Over USA
item.description: Belgium secured a 4-1 victory against the USA in their World Cup clash, advancing to the quarter-finals. The match, held in Seattle, saw Belgium's Charles De Ketelaere score twice, with Romelu Lukaku ...

item.title: SIT report highlights supervisory failures and theft in Ram Temple donation counting room
item.description: A Special Investigation Team (SIT) probe into alleged irregularities in donations to the Ram Temple revealed significant supervisory failures and systematic thefts in the donation counting room. The p...

item.title: Pogacar secures yellow jersey after decisive Tour de France stage win
item.description: Tadej Pogacar, the Slovenian cycling prodigy, has claimed the iconic yellow jersey of the Tour de France after a commanding victory in Stage 3. The 27-year-old world champion overcame a six-second def...

item.title: Government Delays Gas Tariff Notification Amid Legal and IMF Compliance Challenges
item.description: The Pakistani government has missed its July 1, 2026 deadline for notifying the biannual gas tariff, breaching an IMF structural benchmark under the $7bn Extended Fund Facility (EFF). The delay, attri...
